description: Fix CSRF token not being sent on DELETE requests that have no body, which may cause 403 errors from Webflow's server.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/webflow && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Send CSRF token on all non-GET requests regardless of body
userStories.description: The CSRF header is only added when options.body is truthy. DELETE and other mutating requests without a body skip the CSRF header.
acceptanceCriteria: X-CSRF-Token header is sent on all non-GET requests (POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE), not just requests with a body
GET requests still do not include the CSRF header
